allow: PowerShell($raw = Get-Content 'Search keyword report \(25\).csv'; $csv = $raw[2..\($raw.Count-1\)] | ConvertFrom-Csv; Write-Host "Total: $\($csv.Count\)"; $csv | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { $_.PSObject.Properties | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.Name\) = [$\($_.Value\)]" } })

PowerShell($raw = Get-Content 'Search keyword report \(25\).csv'; $csv = $raw[2..\($raw.Count-1\)] | ConvertFrom-Csv; $conv = $csv | Where-Object { [double]$_.Conversions -gt 0 }; Write-Host "=== KEYWORDS WITH CONVERSIONS: $\($conv.Count\) ==="; $conv | Sort-Object { [double]$_.Conversions } -Descending | Select-Object Keyword, 'Match type', Clicks, 'Impr.', CTR, Conversions, 'Cost / conv.', Cost, 'Conv. rate' | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String -Width 220)
